titleStmt.title: SII 41.108: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 108. (A.R. No. 107 of 1905.) Maṉṉārkōyil, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Gōpālaśvamin temple at Maṉṉārkōil.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya, Jatāvarman alias Sundara-Chōḻa-Pāṇḍya dēva, Year 4 = 1025 A.D.

summary.p: States that assembly having met in the hall, ambalam, made some decision about the lands and houses granted to the gardeners, drummers, potters, garland-makers, torch-bearers and dēvaraḍiyārs of the temple of Sri Rājēndrachōḻa viṇṇagar-Āḻvār at Rājarāja-chadurvēdhimañgalam, a brahmadēya in Muḷḷi-Nāḍu, a sub-division of Muḍikoṇḍachōola-vaḷanāḍu, a district of Rājarāja-Pāṇḍināḍu. The record is incomplete.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koccaṭaiya panmarāṉa śrīcuntaracoḻa pāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu nālāvatu Irācarācappāṇṭināṭṭu muṭikoṇṭacoḻavaḷa
nāṭṭu muḷḷināṭṭu brahmadeyam śrīrājarājaccaturvvetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaiyom Ampalam tuṭṭakkiyil kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu śrīrāje
ntracoḻaviṇṇakar Āḻvārkku tirunandavāṉaṅkaḷukku nandavāṉakkuṭikaḷ Irukkavum Uvaccakaḷukkum kucavakaḷukkum tiruviḷakkuppiṭiccut tiruppaḷ
ḷittāmantoṭukkun tevaraṭiyār peṇṭukaḷukku(m)n tiruviḷakkukku neyyaṭṭum veṭṭikuṭikaḷ Iṭaiyarkkum maṟṟu nivantaṅ kaṭavār Eppe
ṟpaṭṭārkkum Iṭṭa nantavāṉaṅkaḷum maṉaikaḷumāvaṉa melaippuṟa maṅkalavīti melaivācalukku vaṭakku cikoyilukkun tirumuṟṟattukkum
vaṭakku vaṭameṉmūlaikkut teṟkkum matiḷukkuk kiḻakkum matiḷukkumeṟku kūṟiṭṭukkuk kiḻakku melavācalukku vaṭakkuvaṭamemūlai
Digital edition of SII 41.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
